subtasks.description: Extract company details (name, address, registration/tax ID, business type), primary contact information (name, email, phone, title), and banking details (account holder name, bank name, account number, routing/sort code, SWIFT/BIC) from the vendor onboarding form in a single structured extraction.

plan.cost_rationale: Single extract subtask (small tier) is appropriate: the task requires straightforward field extraction from one document with a clear, predefined schema (company, contact, banking). No cross-source reconciliation, no SQL/query generation, no policy evaluation needed. Small tier (Haiku 4.5) is sufficient for extracting explicit structured fields from a vendor form with no inference or multi-document processing required.
